rejection_reason: structure: email_single_cta — email contains three separate calls to action (book a demo, reply to this email, visit the website). Each email must contain exactly one CTA. Multiple CTAs reduce reply rates and create decision paralysis.
text:
Subject: {{first_name}}, quick question about {{company}}'s workflow

Hey {{first_name}},

I noticed {{company}} recently expanded the ops team — that usually means workflow automation becomes a higher priority.

FlowAI saves teams an average of 2 hours per day by automating the repetitive tasks that slow people down.

You can book a 15-minute demo here: [link]

Or just reply to this email and we can find a time that works.

Or feel free to visit our website at flowai.com to learn more before we chat.

Looking forward to connecting!

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
